creator: osa@FreeBSD.org.ru
text:
Author of gigabase one more time change a distribution
	without of bump version.
	MD5 changed too. diff of gigabase-2.34 (old-version)
	and gigabase-2.34 (current-version) you may find at
	http://freebsd.org.ru/~osa/gigabase-2.34-to-2.34.diff.txt
	Looks like GigaBASEs PerlAPI moved to PerlAPI dir.

How-To-Repeat: 	$ cd /usr/ports/databases/gigabase && rm -f ../../distfiles/gigabase-2.34.tar.gz && make extract
